metadataNotes: The assigned source is an MIT DSpace publication record and abstract, not a full thesis or book text. Supplemented metadata from the local entry metadata and theory-pack summaries: Gul Abdulnabi Agha, ACTORS: A Model of Concurrent Computation in Distributed Systems, AITR-844, issued June 1, 1985, MIT DSpace handle external source identifier Supplemented operational Actor Model concepts needed for auto-orchestrator design: actors as isolated state owners, asynchronous mailbox messaging, dynamic actor creation, pipelining, supervision, bounded mailboxes, backpressure, and deadlock/divergence failure concerns.
